Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class SocialCustomerServiceSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SocialCustomerServiceSettings
public class SocialCustomerServiceSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for SocialCustomerServiceSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SocialCustomerServiceSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="caseSubjectOption" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}CaseSubjectOption"/>
         <element name="enableAllFBResponseAccounts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInboundProcessingConcurrency" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSocialApprovals" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSocialCaseAssignmentRules" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSocialCustomerService" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSocialPersonaHistoryTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSocialPostHistoryTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSocialReceiveParentPost" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
